identity.name: yourself
identity.description: As good-looking as ever.

identity.name: Front Porch
identity.description:
A sagging wooden porch wraps around the front of the house. A woven doormat lies before the front door. A tarnished brass doorbell is set beside the frame.

The front door leads inside to the east.

identity.name: Hallway
identity.description:
A dim hallway with faded wallpaper and creaking floorboards. A coat rack stands by the door with an old overcoat hanging from it.

Doors lead east to a study and south to the kitchen. A narrow staircase leads up.

identity.name: Study
identity.description:
A wood-paneled study with built-in bookshelves. A heavy desk sits in the center, its drawers shut. An oil painting of a woman hangs on the far wall. A stone fireplace squats in the corner, cold and dark.

The hallway is back to the west.

identity.name: Kitchen
identity.description:
A rustic kitchen with stone counters and a deep ceramic sink. Copper pots hang from hooks above. A handwritten recipe card sits on the counter.

The hallway is north. A doorway leads south to the garden.

identity.name: Garden
identity.description:
An overgrown garden behind the house. A flower bed runs along the back wall, thick with weeds. A small shed leans in one corner with its door ajar. A rusty trowel leans against the shed.

The kitchen doorway is back to the north.

identity.name: Attic
identity.description:
A cramped attic under sloping eaves, thick with dust. A dusty shelf holds an old music box. A heavy steamer trunk sits against the wall.

The stairs lead back down.

identity.name: iron key
identity.description: A heavy iron key, dark with age.

identity.name: front door
identity.description: A heavy oak door with peeling green paint and an old-fashioned keyhole.

identity.name: matchbook
identity.description: A small book of matches from 'The Golden Lantern.' A few matches remain.

identity.name: winding key
identity.description: A small key shaped like a butterfly, clearly meant for winding something delicate.

identity.name: clock spring
identity.description: A tightly coiled metal spring, the kind found inside clockwork.

identity.name: garden trowel
identity.description: A short-handled garden trowel, rusty but solid.

identity.name: brass mechanism
identity.description: A small brass mechanism -- gears, pins, and a tiny drum with raised bumps. The innards of a music box.

identity.name: family locket
identity.description: A silver locket on a fine chain. Inside, a tiny photograph shows your grandmother as a young woman, smiling.

identity.name: heavy desk
identity.description: A mahogany desk with brass handles. The drawers are closed.

scenery.cantTakeMessage: The desk is far too heavy to carry.

identity.name: wall safe
identity.description: A small iron safe set into the wall. It has a three-dial combination lock.

lockable.lockedMessage: The safe has a three-dial combination lock. You don't know the combination yet.

scenery.cantTakeMessage: The safe is embedded in the wall.

identity.name: dusty shelf
identity.description: A rough plank shelf nailed to the wall studs.

scenery.cantTakeMessage: The shelf is nailed to the wall.

identity.name: old music box
identity.description: A wooden music box with a rose-carved lid and a small keyhole on the side. Inside, the cavity is empty -- the mechanism has been removed.

identity.name: steamer trunk
identity.description: A battered steamer trunk with brass fittings. The lock has no keyhole -- just a small slot that looks mechanically connected to the shelf above.

lockable.lockedMessage: The trunk has no keyhole. The lock seems mechanically connected to the shelf above.

scenery.cantTakeMessage: The trunk is far too heavy to lift.

identity.name: woven doormat
identity.description: A faded doormat reading 'WELCOME'. One corner is curled up -- something glints underneath.

identity.name: brass doorbell
identity.description: A tarnished brass button set into the door frame.

identity.name: sagging porch
identity.description: Weathered boards that sag under your weight. The paint peeled away long ago.

identity.name: coat rack
identity.description: A wooden coat rack, slightly tilted. An old overcoat hangs from one hook.

identity.name: old overcoat
identity.description: A moth-eaten wool overcoat. The pockets look like they might hold something.

identity.name: narrow staircase
identity.description: A wooden staircase with groaning steps. It leads up into shadows.

identity.name: faded wallpaper
identity.description: Yellowed wallpaper with a faded floral pattern, peeling at the seams.

identity.name: creaking floorboards
identity.description: Dark wooden floorboards that creak underfoot.

identity.name: study bookshelves
identity.description: Floor-to-ceiling shelves packed with dusty volumes. Nothing stands out.

identity.name: oil painting
identity.description: A portrait of a stern woman in a high collar -- your grandmother, perhaps. The frame sits slightly askew on the wall.

identity.name: stone fireplace
identity.description: A wide stone fireplace with old logs in the grate, ready to burn. The hearthstone is blackened with soot.

identity.name: hearthstone
identity.description: A broad flat stone at the base of the fireplace, blackened with soot. Hard to make out any detail.

identity.name: wood paneling
identity.description: Dark wood panels line the walls, polished but dusty.

identity.name: stone counters
identity.description: Heavy stone countertops, cracked but solid.

identity.name: ceramic sink
identity.description: A deep farmhouse sink with a brass faucet. It drips slowly.

identity.name: copper pots
identity.description: Tarnished copper pots hanging from iron hooks. Decorative now.

identity.name: recipe card
identity.description: Your grandmother's handwriting: 'Lavender shortbread -- butter, sugar, flour, and dried lavender from the garden.' The card is stained and well-loved.

readable.text: Lavender shortbread -- butter, sugar, flour, and dried lavender from the garden.

identity.name: flower bed
identity.description: A raised bed of dark soil tangled with dead weeds. The earth looks soft -- someone was digging here recently.

identity.name: garden shed
identity.description: A small wooden shed with a sagging roof. The door hangs open, revealing empty shelves and cobwebs inside.

identity.name: sloping eaves
identity.description: Low rafters and dusty beams. You have to duck in places.
